title: Turku、Southwest Finland — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Turku、Southwest Finlandの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

TurkuはSouthwest Finlandにある人口194,000の都市です。Finland’s former capital and oldest city, a historic university town on the Aura River with a medieval castle.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
